title: Spanish Date Crumble
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert featuring Spanish dates, topped with a flaky crumble.
instructions: Cut the flaky pastry into small pieces and mix with the all-purpose flour, granulated sugar, and cold unsalted butter until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Arrange the Spanish dates on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the Spanish dates.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the crumble is golden brown.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
